depends_on.name: daqsystem_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the DAQ system this metadata reader is associated with.

fields.name: ndi_daqmetadatareader_class
fields.documentation: The class name of the metadata reader implementation.

fields.name: metadata_names
fields.documentation: Comma-separated list of metadata field names this reader can extract (e.g., 'sample_rate,num_channels,device_name').

fields.name: tab_separated_file_parameter
fields.documentation: Optional 'lazy hook' field: if the metadata for each epoch is a tab-separated file, the base ndi.daq.metadatareader uses this field to identify the per-epoch file without requiring a subclass. Preserved as a v1 → V_delta pass-through; new code should prefer a dedicated subclass (e.g., daqmetadatareader_tsv) when one exists.
